Argument Reference

  • load_balancer_id - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • name - (Required) Updating this value after creation is not supported.
  • policy - (Required) (Updatable) The load balancing policy assigned to the backend set.
  • health_checker - (Required) (Updatable) The backend set health check configuration.
  • backends - (Optional) (Updatable) The backend servers associated with the backend set.
  • ssl_configuration - (Optional) (Updatable) The backend set SSL configuration.
  • session_persistence_configuration - (Optional) (Updatable) Application-cookie session persistence details.
  • lb_cookie_session_persistence_configuration - (Optional) (Updatable) Load-balancer-cookie session persistence details.
